question: Write a function void applyFilter(const vector<vector<int>>& input, const vector<vector<int>>& filter, vector<vector<int>>& output) that applies a 3x3 filter to the input matrix.
errors: Convolution logic incorrectly uses the center pixel `input[i][j]` for all filter multiplications instead of the corresponding neighbor pixels `input[i+k][j+l]`.
